articles.title: Invest 91L declared in the Gulf, with heavy downpours expected in Florida - FOX Weather
articles.description: The National Hurricane Center has declared Invest 91L in the Gulf of America right off the coast of Florida.
articles.content:
The National Hurricane Center has declared Invest 91L in the Gulf of America right off the coast of Florida. 
The invest has a low chance of development over the next two days, as it moves slowly to… [+1245 chars]
